recent_projects.name: optimum-rbln
recent_projects.summary: Optimum RBLN is the interface between the HuggingFace Transformers and Diffusers libraries and RBLN accelerators. It provides a set of tools enabling easy model loading and inference on single and multiple rbln device settings for different downstream tasks.
